title: Long-Term vs Short-Term Thinking
html:
Stub. Foundational HS-era frame: short-term thinking = dad's alcoholism, immediate satisfaction, "the safe job"; long-term thinking = Travis Boersma, compound returns, founder mentality. First crystallized in 2020 questbridge essays and the Travis Boersma shadow day retelling.

Source summaries

  • 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 — broker on panic-selling vs holding through downturns ("rising tide raises all ships")
  • 2020 09 27 Finalize of QuestBridge Scholarship Essays — Travis Boersma shadow day retelling

related.label: Investing 101 with a longtime broker — Mar 14 2019 conversation
